title: Gooey Malaysian Muffin Stir-Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir-fry dish made with gooey goodness, malaysian flair, and a hint of muffin magic.

ingredients.name: Muffin mix-ins
ingredients.notes: your choice of nuts or dried fruit

instructions: Preheat wok or large skillet to medium-high heat.
Add fry oil and swirl to coat.
Add fresh stir-fry veggies and cook until tender.
Add Malaysian noodles and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in gooey sauce and muffin mix-ins.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until sauce is bubbly.
